featured.title: RoCE-enabled L3EVPN over EVPN-VXLAN (Spine–Leaf Fabric)
description: Implemented EVPN-VXLAN L3 connectivity with multiple VNIs; validated host reachability across leafs and segmentation across VNIs.
Configured IRB (Integrated Routing & Bridging) for L2/L3 gateway functionality and validated inter-subnet reachability.
Implemented and validated soft-RoCE (RDMA over Converged Ethernet) inside VMs hosted in Containerlab.
Designed a host-driven load-balancing scheme by modifying RXE (Soft-RNIC) source-port allocation — replacing QP-hashing with custom allocation — improving flow distribution.

featured.title: Deepfake Audio Detection on the FoR Dataset
description: Compared multiple statistical classifiers and an ensemble on the Fake-or-Real (FoR) dataset.
Logistic regression gave the most balanced accuracy across real and fake audio.
SVM showed a clear bias toward real-audio detection.
